title: OpeningIteration
description: OpeningIteration: Describe a single opening iteration for all the openings within the SAP context.

Width.description: New width of all the openings. Must be a positive number. If left blank, no changes to width will be made. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Height.description: New height of the all the openings. Must be a positive number. If left blank, no changes to height will be made. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Pitch.description: New pitch of all the openings. Set as the pitch of roof containing roof window. If left blank, no changes to pitch will be made.

Include.description: A list of Opening names to make changes to. If this is left blank, then all openings in the SAP report will be updated based on the values of this iteration.

Name.description: Provide the name of this iteration. The name should be unique across all iterations in your model, and should match any coordination with other models (over heating, daylighting, etc.) you may be running parametrics on.

Prefix.description: What value should be used to prefix the name of this iteration when combining with other iterations.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
